category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Lesotho.

title.en: China-to-Lesotho EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入莱索托：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入賴索托：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Lesotho LSI standards context, LEWA regulation, LEC grid-connection requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, OCPP interoperability context, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Lesotho's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid genuinely matches China's nominal voltage and frequency, but connector, IEC evidence, utility acceptance, and project requirements remain separate gates.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与莱索托LSI标准体系、LEWA监管、LEC并网要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、OCPP互操作背景，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。莱索托220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国标称电压和频率真正一致，但接口、IEC证据、公用事业验收和项目要求仍是独立门槛。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與賴索托LSI標準體系、LEWA監管、LEC併網要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、OCPP互操作背景，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。賴索托220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國標稱電壓和頻率真正一致，但接口、IEC證據、公用事業驗收和項目要求仍是獨立門檻。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Lesotho, the unusual positive point is that Lesotho's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid genuinely matches China's nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz design baseline. That does not make a China domestic charger Lesotho-ready. The main practical gaps are: (1) LSI / project acceptance of IEC-based safety and EMC evidence, especially IEC 61851-1, IEC 61851-23, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000; (2) connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, consistent with South African / IEC regional practice; (3) LEWA and LEC approval for grid-connected installations and any commercial electricity service; (4) site-level power-capacity assessment because Lesotho imports most electricity from South Africa through Eskom interconnections and supplements with Muela hydro; (5) OCPP-ready networking where a public or fleet charging project requires remote monitoring, payment, or load management. A dedicated mandatory Lesotho EVSE product certification route could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14, so exporters should verify the exact LSI, LEWA, LEC, customs, and project route before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入莱索托时，一个少见的有利点是：莱索托220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz电网与中国220/380 V 50 Hz标称设计基线真正一致。但这并不意味着中国国内充电桩可直接用于莱索托。主要实务差距包括：(1) LSI或项目方对IEC体系安全和EMC证据的接受，尤其是IEC 61851-1、IEC 61851-23、IEC 62196和IEC 61000；(2) 接口须从GB/T 20234改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，符合南非/IEC区域实践方向；(3) 并网安装和任何商业供电服务须取得LEWA和LEC批准；(4) 须做站点供电容量评估，因为莱索托大部分电力依赖南非Eskom互联进口，并由Muela水电补充；(5) 公共或车队充电项目如需远程监控、支付或负载管理，应具备OCPP联网能力。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认莱索托专门针对EVSE整机的强制产品认证路径，出口商应在出货前核实具体LSI、LEWA、LEC、海关和项目路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入賴索托時，一個少見的有利點是：賴索托220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz電網與中國220/380 V 50 Hz標稱設計基線真正一致。但這並不意味著中國國內充電樁可直接用於賴索托。主要實務差距包括：(1) LSI或項目方對IEC體系安全和EMC證據的接受，尤其是IEC 61851-1、IEC 61851-23、IEC 62196和IEC 61000；(2) 接口須從GB/T 20234改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，符合南非/IEC區域實踐方向；(3) 併網安裝和任何商業供電服務須取得LEWA和LEC批准；(4) 須做站點供電容量評估，因為賴索托大部分電力依賴南非Eskom互聯進口，並由Muela水電補充；(5) 公共或車隊充電項目如需遠程監控、支付或負載管理，應具備OCPP聯網能力。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認賴索托專門針對EVSE整機的強制產品認證路徑，出口商應在出貨前核實具體LSI、LEWA、LEC、海關和項目路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, LSI scope determination, LEWA licence approval, LEC connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, energy operators, and installers should verify current Lesotho conformity assessment rules, LEWA licensing requirements, LEC connection procedures, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Lesotho's EV charging framework is at an early stage and may evolve materially.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、LSI适用范围裁定、LEWA许可证批准、LEC并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、能源运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行莱索托合格评定规则、LEWA许可证要求、LEC并网程序、IEC标准版本及安装规则。莱索托电动汽车充电框架尚处于早期阶段，可能发生重大变化。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、LSI適用範圍裁定、LEWA許可證批准、LEC併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、能源運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行賴索托合格評定規則、LEWA許可證要求、LEC併網程序、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。賴索托電動汽車充電框架尚處於早期階段，可能發生重大變化。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
